name: Natural Gas School Bus LLC
recent_news: No web presence found for an operating school bus contractor under this name. Address 9233 Denton Dr Dallas matches Natural Gas Vehicles Texas Inc, a CNG conversion / fueling station services firm (not a school bus operator). 'Natural Gas School Bus LLC' is likely an affiliated single-purpose entity holding CNG school buses or a clean-fuel grant vehicle, not a transportation contractor.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Appears to be a CNG conversion / equipment entity colocated with Natural Gas Vehicles Texas at 9233 Denton Dr, not an independent student-transport contractor. Likely false positive in source list — skip.

name: Trombly School Bus
principals: Michael J. Trombly (legacy President/founder family); John J. McCarthy (acquirer of control 2019 via Van Pool Transportation LLC)
districts_or_customers: Dracut Public Schools and surrounding Merrimack Valley / eastern Massachusetts districts
recent_news: ACQUIRED: Trombly Motor Coach Service Inc (DBA Trombly School Bus) was acquired in Sept 2019 by Van Pool Transportation LLC / John J. McCarthy (FMCSA Federal Register notice Aug 2021). Joined the Beacon Mobility family of companies alongside NRT Bus (2021). Beacon Mobility is Audax PE-backed and ran a sale process in 2023 with Morgan Stanley (~USD 200m EBITDA).
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target — already PE-owned by competitor platform Beacon Mobility (Audax). Tag as competitor-owned; could be relevant only as competitive intelligence on Beacon's MA footprint.
